skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all Electric Code allies.
skill1.note: Fires on every team FB regardless of who bursted (hard rule 6). Correct as worded.

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 55.31% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
skill1.note: Flat add of HER ATK to every Electric teammate incl. self.
Faster reload = more shots AND faster last-bullet proc cadence for every Electric ally.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when firing the last bullet. Affects the 2 enemy unit(s) with the highest final ATK.
skill2.note: '2 highest ATK enemies' collapses to single partless boss. FB by TIMING (no noFb; normal-fire-keyed rider).

skill2.kitLine: Deals 382.42% of final ATK as damage.
skill2.note: Named last-bullet archetype proc (HARD RULE 5), fires every reload cycle. crit:true is prior-2 default (function riders crit at caster rate); ⚑ unverified — verify popup colour.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when firing the last bullet. Affects self.
Damage to Interruption Parts ▲ 6.91% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: INERT on partless boss (contributes 0). Kept for kit fidelity / future parts-boss safety. Audited-seen, not dropped.

burst.note: burstCast fires ONLY on rotations SHE bursts (hard rule 6). Needs real B1→B2→B3 chain; lone unit = zero FBs.
ammo 5×0.2608≈1.3 → ~1-round mags for 10s. This is the kit's engine: every shot becomes last bullet, so 382.42% proc fires ~per shot. ⚑ proc count unverified (heaviest lever).
Stacks with S1 49.28 on herself when FB is up: ~+77% total ≈ 141f→~80f ≈ 1.33s gaps between 1-round mags.

burst.kitLine: Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲ 42.24% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Damage-Up bucket; engine gates on real elemental advantage vs boss. Inert unless boss is Electric-weak. ⚑ confirm graded boss element before reading board number.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the 382.42% last-bullet proc count (especially inside her 10s burst window with ~1-round magazines) is an unmeasured cadence-derived estimate
documentedConfounds.why: Proc count inside burst window is the heaviest damage lever; estimate of 5-7 procs is engine-derived from cadence tuple, not footage-verified. If mag floors to 2 instead of 1, proc rate halves.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Max Ammo ▼73.92% is modeled as ~1-round magazines for 10s — the shot/reload/proc economy of that window is unverified against footage
documentedConfounds.why: The entire burst-window economy (shots, reloads, proc count) hinges on whether round(1.304)=1 or ceil→2. Directly multiplies the 382.42% proc damage.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲42.24% only applies when the boss is Electric-disadvantaged
documentedConfounds.why: Correctly gated by engine; inert on non-Electric-weak bosses. Not a modeling error — a conditional that may or may not pay out depending on graded boss element.

documentedConfounds.text: cadence: SG fire rate + reloadFrames 141 are datamined, unverified (⚑ cadence tuple)
documentedConfounds.why: Both out-of-burst last-bullet cadence (mags per fight) and burst-window proc count hinge on this tuple. Datamine-unreliable for SG, not text-derivable.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ crit:true on the 382.42% rider is a prior-2 default (function riders crit at caster rate) — unverified
documentedConfounds.why: At 15% crit / 150% critDmg the impact is ~+7.5% on the proc. Small lever; verify popup colour (orange=crit) to confirm.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ SG pellet split/landing — 10 pellets/shot through class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table (shipped default, per-unit landing is measured-only refinement)
documentedConfounds.why: Uses the class-default table; no per-unit factor invented. Correct posture per non-negotiable #2 (measured > fudge). Not a gap source unless the class table itself is wrong.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Remove banner only when unit has been measured/hand-tuned.
documentedConfounds.why: Author intent marker: the entire override is a hypothesis pending measurement. Not a specific mechanic gap but a global confidence flag.

authorIntentSummary: The override is a parser-baseline hypothesis (not yet validated) that block-models all 7 kit lines with no silent drops and empty unmodeled arrays. The core engine is the burst-window ammo reduction (~1-round mags) turning every shot into a last-bullet proc of the 382.42% S2 rider; the heaviest unmeasured lever is the proc count inside that 10s window, which depends entirely on the datamined SG cadence tuple (fire rate + reloadFrames 141). Secondary approximations: crit:true on the proc (prior-2 default, ~+7.5% impact), partsDamagePct kept as inert stat fidelity, and elemAdvantageDamagePct correctly gated but only pays out vs Electric-weak bosses. No board data exists — the unit has never been graded.
